title: rhadamanthus floribundus
intro: Rhadamanthus floribundus, also known as the Cape Marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rhadamanthus floribundus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to promote overall skin health.
